parsedJson.summary: The site has a clear roofing message and visible quote buttons, but the first screen feels generic and lacks immediate proof that this is a trusted Brisbane roofer.

issues.title: Mobile phone number is hidden
issues.what_observed: On the mobile screenshot, the bottom sticky bar shows two green buttons, 'Contact Us' and 'Call Now', but the actual phone number is not visible anywhere in the first screen.
issues.why_problem: A customer searching for a roofer on their phone is often trying to call quickly. If they cannot see the number immediately, they may return to Google and tap another roofer whose number is visible.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Mobile header or sticky bar shows a tap-to-call button with the phone number, such as 'Call 0474 461 788', visible without scrolling.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the generic mobile 'Call Now' label with 'Call 0474 461 788' and keep it fixed at the bottom; also add a small phone icon and number in the mobile header if space allows.
issues.plain_explanation: 手机页面第一屏看不到真实电话号码，只看到“Call Now”按钮。
issues.customer_impact: 本地客户通常是在手机上找屋顶维修，很多人会直接打电话。若号码不马上出现，访客可能几秒内回到Google，点竞争对手的电话。

issues.title: No proof points above the fold
issues.what_observed: The desktop and mobile hero areas show the logo, headline, roof image, and quote buttons, but no Google rating, review count, licence, insurance, years in business, or Brisbane service-area proof is visible.
issues.why_problem: Roofing is a high-trust service. A Google-searching customer wants reassurance before inviting someone to inspect their home; without proof, the site looks less established than competitors showing reviews and credentials immediately.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: The first screen includes a compact trust row under the headline: Google stars, review count, licensed and insured, Brisbane service area, and emergency repair availability if true.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Add a trust strip directly below the hero headline and above the CTA buttons with 3-4 verified proof points, using small icons and plain labels.
issues.plain_explanation: 首页第一眼没有看到评分、评价数量、执照、保险或布里斯班本地服务证明。
issues.customer_impact: 修屋顶金额高、风险高，客户会先找“看起来靠谱”的公司。访客通常在8秒内形成第一印象，缺少信任信息会让报价咨询减少。

issues.title: Hero image feels too impersonal
issues.what_observed: The desktop hero image is a dark aerial view of a large commercial roof with tiny workers and no clear close-up of finished roofing quality or a local home.
issues.why_problem: A homeowner or small-business owner looking for a Brisbane roofer may not instantly feel this company handles their specific problem. The image shows scale, but not care, craftsmanship, or local relevance.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Hero image shows a bright Brisbane residential or commercial roof project with visible finished roof detail, workers, or before-and-after context.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace or rotate the desktop hero with a sharper project photo that shows completed roof work; add a small caption such as 'Roof repairs and replacements across Brisbane'.
issues.plain_explanation: 桌面首图像大型工地航拍，距离太远，看不出屋顶施工质量，也不像客户自己的房子。
issues.customer_impact: 客户会下意识找“这家公司能解决我的问题”的证据。图片太泛，会让住宅客户觉得不匹配，从而少点报价。

issues.title: Logo dominates the header
issues.what_observed: On desktop, the Rapid Roof Solutions logo takes up a large amount of vertical space in the black header, while the phone number and quote button sit smaller on the right.
issues.why_problem: The brand mark is visible, but it pushes the practical action items into a less prominent role. A local-search visitor cares most about whether the roofer is credible and easy to contact.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Header uses a smaller logo, clear navigation, prominent phone number, and one high-contrast quote button with balanced spacing.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Reduce the desktop logo height, tighten the header, and give the phone number equal visual weight to the quote button.
issues.plain_explanation: 页头Logo太抢眼，反而让电话和报价按钮没那么突出。
issues.customer_impact: 本地服务网站最重要的是让客户快速联系。联系入口不够突出，会降低来电和询价。

issues.title: Dark first screen feels heavy
issues.what_observed: The desktop first screen uses a black header, dark image overlay, white block headline, and green buttons, creating a very dark overall impression.
issues.why_problem: The site looks serious, but also a little harsh and less approachable. For homeowners comparing roofers, a brighter visual tone can feel more transparent and trustworthy.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A brighter hero with natural roof colors, strong readable text, white or light sections immediately below, and green used as the main action accent rather than the dominant mood.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Lighten the hero overlay, introduce a white trust panel under the headline, and reserve the green for CTAs and small accents.
issues.plain_explanation: 首页整体太黑，虽然醒目，但会显得有点压抑和不够亲近。
issues.customer_impact: 屋顶维修客户需要安全感和信任感。页面太暗可能让人感觉不透明，影响他们继续了解或提交报价。

issues.title: Next section has weak pull
issues.what_observed: At the bottom of the desktop screenshot, the next section begins with a small green 'About Rapid Roof Solutions' heading on a black background, while a partial image is cut off to the right.
issues.why_problem: After the hero, visitors need quick reassurance and service clarity. A low-contrast about intro does not strongly pull them into the next step or answer their immediate roofing concerns.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: The next visible section starts with a clear proof-led block: 'Brisbane roof repairs, replacements and inspections' plus 3 service cards or trust metrics.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the first below-fold 'About' lead-in with a service-and-proof section that shows main services, review proof, and a secondary quote CTA.
issues.plain_explanation: 首屏下面接的是很普通的“关于我们”，没有马上告诉客户能做什么、为什么可信。
issues.customer_impact: 客户往下滑时想快速确认服务是否匹配。内容承接弱，会让一部分访客在还没询价前离开。

positive_observations: The main headline clearly says 'Roof Installations & Repairs', so the core service is immediately understandable.
Green quote buttons are visible on both desktop and mobile above the fold.
The mobile layout keeps the primary call-to-action sticky at the bottom, which is useful for phone-based local searches.
redesign_priorities: 1. Put the real phone number and quote action visibly in the mobile first screen and sticky bar.
2. Add above-fold trust proof: Google rating, reviews, licence/insurance, and Brisbane service-area messaging.
3. Replace the generic dark hero treatment with brighter project imagery and a proof-led section immediately below.
